name: Headset Purple
description:
A special gift for joining our community. Now you’re part of the gang and never have to dig alone again. Put these on and stay connected with all the other worms in the loop!

By: Marlena Mast

name: +4 Spine
description:
[b]Warning:[/b] Removing this item will result in immediate 'Slime Puddle Syndrome'!
Your Spine determines the maximum number of segments your nervous system can handle before it gives up.
[b]Current Specification:[/b] 4.
This supports 1 Head and 1 Tail, with room for 2 Body Parts in between.
[b]Maintenance:[/b] To increase your length allowance, please deposit items into the worm's mouth. [i]More items = More food = More Spine = More Worm.[/i]

By: Marlena Mast

name: Hanane
description:
Before the age of the wiggle, there was the sprout. This yellow bloom was once the star of the show, though her expression suggests she never quite realized it. There isn’t a single thought behind that vacant grin... just pure, unfiltered sunshine and a complete lack of brain cells.

By: Marlena Mast

name: Good Noodle Star
description:
You played the demo for 5 minutes without breaking anything. Officially a Good Noodle. Wear it with pride!

By: Marlena Mast

name: Beta Heart
description:
They say the early bird catches the worm, but they forgot one thing: the early worm gets the heart. A rare specimen awarded to those who started digging before the soil was even settled. Thanks for helping us clear out the literal bugs!

By: Marlena Mast
